description: A designed 'MOST WANTED' fugitive card in a square format. A bold red banner across the top carries the white serif headline 'MOST WANTED'. The center is filled with a booking/mugshot-style color photograph of a man with short dark hair, thin eyebrows, a mustache and a goatee, wearing an orange jail jumpsuit, photographed against a plain pale blue-gray wall and looking slightly off-camera. A matching red banner across the bottom reads 'ANONYMOUS TIP LINE' above the large white number '866-DHS-2-ICE', with the DHS seal and 'U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement' text to the right. Per the tweet this is ICE Most Wanted fugitive Ismael Ortega Hernandez (homicide warrant in Arizona, a Mexican national). The styling deliberately evokes a classic law-enforcement wanted poster (red/white, mugshot, tip line) to solicit public tips and reinforce a narrative of dangerous criminal aliens at large. Target audience: the general public, to crowdsource location tips.
